title: LOCAL OFFICES OF EMERGENCY CONTACTS - 211info
text: OREGON DEPARTMENT OF EMERGENCY MANAGEMENT LOCAL OFFICES OF EMERGENCY CONTACTS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a direct link to state, county, city, and tribal emergency office contacts. 3930 Fairview Industrial Drive SE Salem, OR 97302 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: No standard hours Email Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for state, county, city, and tribal emergency office contacts. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: City Offices of Emergency Services County Offices of Emergency Services State Offices of Emergency Services Tribal Offices of Emergency Services Other Services Offered At This Location: DISASTER SERVICES - OR-ALERT DISASTER SERVICES - OREGON DEPARTMENT OF EMERGENCY MANAGEMENT DISASTER SERVICES - STATE OF OREGON FLOOD DASHBOARD If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OREGON DEPARTMENT OF EMERGENCY MANAGEMENT
